# Pull Request

## Description
<!-- Provide a brief description of the changes -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant option with an "x" -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/UI update
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility improvement
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix

## Checklist
<!-- Mark completed items with an "x" -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have run `npm run format` to format my code
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and fixed all issues
- [ ] I have run `npm run type-check` and fixed all TypeScript errors
- [ ] My code builds without errors (`npm run build`)

### Accessibility (ADA Compliance)
- [ ] I have tested my changes with keyboard navigation
- [ ] All interactive elements are keyboard accessible
- [ ] All images have appropriate alt text
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG 2.1 AA standards
- [ ] Screen reader testing completed (if applicable)
- [ ] Form inputs have associated labels
- [ ] ARIA attributes are used correctly (if applicable)
- [ ] `npm run test:a11y` passes without violations

### Testing
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have tested in multiple browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
- [ ] I have tested on mobile devices
- [ ] I have tested with keyboard only
- [ ] I have tested with a screen reader (if UI changes)

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have added comments to complex code sections
- [ ] I have updated the README if needed
- [ ] I have updated environment variable documentation if needed

### Security
- [ ] No sensitive data (API keys, passwords, etc.) is committed
- [ ] Environment variables are used for configuration
- [ ] No security vulnerabilities introduced

- [ ] Changes align with project goals
